source: Telegram outage screenshots (June 17-18 2026) — root mode returns 'Couldn't reach my language model' on every turn.
title: All LLM providers exhausted simultaneously → Pi fully down (root + normie)
current_state: RESOLVED 2026-06-21: Anthropic credits restored (live ping OK). CEREBRAS_API_KEY + OPENROUTER_API_KEY set (T-213). Error classifier patched to surface actionable cause (S-152). All providers operational.
target_state: At least one working provider + error message that names the real cause so the user knows what to fix.
diagnosis: Anthropic out of credits; Groq/Gemini free tiers exhausted; Cerebras/OpenRouter keys unset. Pi had zero working LLM paths.
migration_plan: 1. DONE (S-152): error classifier in pi_agent.py names real cause (credit_balance, resource_exhausted, etc.).
2. DONE (S-153/T-213): CEREBRAS_API_KEY + OPENROUTER_API_KEY set for cheap-tier resilience.
3. DONE: Anthropic credits restored — live ping confirmed OK 2026-06-21.
